|desc={{p|Salamence}} was sent out along with {{p|Shelgon}} in a Double Battle against [[Ash's Pikachu]] and {{AP|Swellow}}. Salamence was able to easily defeat Pikachu and Swellow as Shelgon's defeat tired them out.

Salamence's only known move is {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}
